rule_name: External Access to Sensitive Administrative Interfaces
description: Monitors successful HTTP 200 responses to known backend configurations and administrative panels originating from external, non-whitelisted IP addresses.
search_query: index=main sourcetype=_json status_code=200 uri_path IN ("/admin", "/config", "/actuator/env", "/phpmyadmin") | where NOT cidrmatch("10.0.0.0/8", src_ip) AND NOT cidrmatch("192.168.0.0/16", src_ip)
